mapper.sql: select id, stock_code, kline_type, trade_time, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma60, macd_dif, macd_dea, macd_bar, rsi6, rsi14, vol_ratio, trend_slope from stock_indicator
mapper.insert:
insert into stock_indicator ( stock_code, kline_type, trade_time, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma60, macd_dif, macd_dea, macd_bar, rsi6, rsi14, vol_ratio, trend_slope ) values
(#{item.stockCode}, #{item.klineType}, #{item.tradeTime}, #{item.ma5}, #{item.ma10}, #{item.ma20}, #{item.ma60}, #{item.macdDif}, #{item.macdDea}, #{item.macdBar}, #{item.rsi6}, #{item.rsi14}, #{item.volRatio}, #{item.trendSlope})
on duplicate key update ma5 = values(ma5), ma10 = values(ma10), ma20 = values(ma20), ma60 = values(ma60), macd_dif = values(macd_dif), macd_dea = values(macd_dea), macd_bar = values(macd_bar), rsi6 = values(rsi6), rsi14 = values(rsi14), vol_ratio = values(vol_ratio), trend_slope = values(trend_slope)
